allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('peerDeps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./node_modules/@stripe/react-stripe-js/package.json'\); console.log\('version:', p.version\); console.log\('peerDeps:', JSON.stringify\(p.peerDependencies, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./node_modules/styled-jsx/package.json'\); console.log\('version:', p.version\); console.log\('peerDeps:', JSON.stringify\(p.peerDependencies, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const React = require\('react'\); console.log\('React version:', React.version\); console.log\('useInsertionEffect:', typeof React.useInsertionEffect\); console.log\('default export:', typeof React.default\);")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('./node_modules/react/react.react-server.js'\); console.log\('useInsertionEffect:', typeof r.useInsertionEffect\); console.log\('default:', typeof r.default\); console.log\('type:', typeof r\);")
